sub_modules.gs_fixed_mul: Combinational signed fixed-point multiplier with FRAC-bit normalization.
sub_modules.gs_reciprocal: Combinational fixed-point reciprocal generator using scaled integer division.
sub_modules.gs_iteration_2x2: Combinational Gauss-Seidel update datapath for one 2x2 iteration.
sub_modules.gs_testcase_selector: Combinational output selector for the fixed ground-truth system-test vectors, with fallback to iterative datapath results.
